name: Calie’s Café
shortDescription: A small kiosk-style café with a warm, homey setup offering coffee, milk tea, and quick snacks—ideal for students looking for an affordable and convenient tambayan inside campus.
directions: From Miagao Church, go to the tricycle area near Dimsum Panda and ride a red tricycle. Tell the driver to drop you at UPV CUB.
otherInfo: Features a display of pastries and packaged snacks alongside espresso drinks, frappes, and milk tea. Best for quick orders between classes.

name: Beans and Bubbles
shortDescription: A modern café with a clean and cozy interior offering coffee, meals, and pastries—perfect for studying, hanging out, or relaxing with both indoor and alfresco seating.
directions: Go to the tricycle area at the back of Miagao Church beside Marillac School and ride a tricycle. Tell the driver to drop you at Beans and Bubbles in Barangay Mat-y.
otherInfo: Fully air-conditioned with charging outlets available. Serves rice meals, coffee, and pastries. Features an alfresco area and is student-friendly. A laundry shop is located beside the café, and two dogs can often be seen roaming around.

name: The Box Coffee
shortDescription: A minimalist specialty coffee shop with a calm and dimly lit atmosphere, perfect for focused studying, quiet conversations, or solo coffee sessions.
location: In front of UP Visayas, Miagao, Iloilo
directions: Located in front of UP Visayas. From the main gate, a short walk will take you directly to the café.
otherInfo:
• Free WiFi
• Charging outlets available
• Serves specialty coffee and pastries
• Quiet and cozy ambiance ideal for studying

name: Quicky Coffee
shortDescription: A simple and spacious café with a laid-back vibe, perfect for group hangouts, casual study sessions, and affordable meals and coffee.
location: Nonato Extension St., Baybay Norte, Miagao (Near Frig's Apt)
directions: From Miagao Church, take the road turning right before the Miagao Bridge, then go straight until you reach Nonato Extension St. The café is located near Frig's Apartment.
otherInfo:
• Fully air-conditioned
• Free WiFi
• Serves coffee, waffles, rice meals, sandwiches, and snacks
• Spacious seating, ideal for groups

name: DU'AG
shortDescription: A unique café and outdoor tambayan offering a mix of coffee, nature, and relaxing riverside vibes—perfect for unwinding, group hangouts, and late-night chill sessions.
directions: From Miagao SK Gym, go straight along the road, then turn left toward Sitio Halin. Continue until you reach DU'AG.
otherInfo:
• Fully air-conditioned indoor area
• Free WiFi and charging outlets
• Serves coffee, drinks, sandwiches, rice meals, panini, pasta, and snacks
• Alfresco and camping setup available
• Riverside view with bonfire area
• Friendly and accommodating owners

name: Panda Coffee Hello Lemon Miagao
shortDescription: A bright and cheerful takeout-only drink stall offering affordable coffee, lemonade, and sweet refreshments—perfect for quick grabs on the go.
location: In front of ISAT-U Miagao, Iloilo
directions: Located right across the street of ISAT-U Miagao, making it easily accessible for students.
otherInfo:
• Takeout only
• Offers coffee, lemonade, and sweet drinks
• Very affordable and student-friendly
• Ideal for quick refreshment stops

name: RC Kape Break
shortDescription: A mobile coffee and snack cart offering affordable drinks and street-style meals—perfect for quick bites and late afternoon to evening tambayan.
location: Usually beside Miagao Church (location may vary)
directions: Usually found beside Miagao Church in the afternoon. Location may change depending on town events.
otherInfo:
• Mobile cart setup (location varies)
• Offers coffee, sweet drinks, meals, snacks, and siomai
• Budget-friendly options
• Best visited in the afternoon to late evening
